title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into and Sign a Tripartite Memorandum of Agreement with the Department of Health-center for Health Development Calabarzon, and Los Baños Municipal Health Office on the Processing, Transfer and Distribution of Covid-19 Benefits to Eligible Health Workers Employed by the LGU Under Los Baños Municipal Health Office. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 12/21/20)
